setupGuide.notes: Placeholder for Melbourne Grand Prix Circuit — 57 laps / 302.3 km reproduced as 94 laps of Adelaide Modern. Modern Adelaide keeps the Australian parkland street-circuit character.
Placeholder for Bahrain International Circuit — 57 laps / 308.2 km reproduced as 70 laps of Jerez 2019. Jerez is a modern permanent Spanish autodrome standing in for the Tilke desert layout.
Placeholder for Shanghai International Circuit — 56 laps / 305.1 km reproduced as 59 laps of the Nürburgring GP. Both are wide modern GP circuits with a long back straight into heavy braking.
Placeholder for Sochi Autodrom — 53 laps / 309.7 km reproduced as 74 laps of Estoril 2019. Estoril stands in as a flowing modern permanent circuit.
AMS2 ships the 2021 Azure (Monaco) layout; the venue is real and largely unchanged since 2016, so the historical lap count is kept.
AMS2 ships the modern Montreal layout; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept.
Placeholder for Baku City Circuit — 51 laps / 306.2 km reproduced as 97 laps of Long Beach. Long Beach keeps the fast street-circuit character with long straights and 90-degree corners.
AMS2 ships the modern Red Bull Ring (Spielberg GP); the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept.
AMS2 ships the 2019 Silverstone layout, effectively identical to 2016; the historical lap count is kept.
AMS2 ships the 2025 Hungaroring; the venue is real and largely unchanged in character since 2016, so the historical lap count is kept.
AMS2 ships the modern Hockenheim GP layout, the same circuit used for the 2016 German GP; the historical lap count is kept.
AMS2 ships the 2022 Spa layout; the venue is real and close to the 2016 configuration, so the historical lap count is kept.
AMS2 ships the 2020 Monza layout, effectively identical to 2016; the historical lap count is kept.
Placeholder for Marina Bay Street Circuit — 61 laps / 308.8 km reproduced as 63 laps of Imola. Imola stands in as a tight, walled modern permanent circuit for the Singapore night race.
Placeholder for Sepang International Circuit — 56 laps / 310.4 km reproduced as 70 laps of Curvelo. Curvelo is a modern permanent circuit standing in for the Tilke layout.
Suzuka appears in AMS2 as Kansai; the venue is real, so the historical lap count is kept on the modern GP layout.
AMS2 ships the Circuit of the Americas GP layout, the same circuit used for the 2016 US GP; the historical lap count is kept.
Placeholder for Autódromo Hermanos Rodríguez — 71 laps / 305.4 km reproduced as 71 laps of Interlagos 1993. Interlagos keeps the Latin-American venue character.
AMS2 ships the modern Interlagos layout, the same circuit used for the 2016 Brazilian GP; the historical lap count is kept.
Placeholder for Yas Marina Circuit — 55 laps / 305.4 km reproduced as 62 laps of Imola 2005. The 2005 Imola layout stands in as a modern permanent circuit for the season finale.
